title: Acquaintances
message: You two might run in similar circles or share a few mutual friends, but the deep bonding hasn't quite happened yet. You differ on a lot of fundamental personality traits.
advice: Friendships take time. Try finding a common niche interest to bond over, rather than forcing deep conversations too early.
zodiacTip: Your differing elements mean you have vastly different ways of recharging. Be mindful of their social battery.

title: Solid Friends
message: You have a solid, dependable friendship! You share a good number of laughs and generally have a great time when you hang out. The trust is building steadily.
advice: To upgrade this to BFF status, try being a little more vulnerable. Share a secret or rely on them for support during a stressful time.
zodiacTip: Your signs suggest you make a great team for activities and adventures. Plan a road trip!

title: True Besties
message: You are true besties! You likely share inside jokes, can communicate with just a look, and deeply understand each other's quirks and flaws. This is a high-quality friendship.
advice: Make sure you celebrate this friendship! It's easy to take close friends for granted. Plan a 'friendiversary' or just randomly remind them how much you appreciate them.
zodiacTip: Astrologically, you provide incredible emotional support for one another. You balance each other out perfectly.

title: Soul Sisters / Blood Brothers
message: An absolutely unbreakable bond. You two are practically siblings at this point. The algorithm dictates near-perfect alignment in humor, loyalty, and mutual respect.
advice: Never let them go. Friendships this deep are rarer than romance. Continue being each other's loudest cheerleaders.
zodiacTip: Your cosmic connection transcends standard compatibility—you are destined to be in each other's lives.
